[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVector](../../TextmodeVector.md) / limit

# Method: limit()

```ts
limit(max): this;
```

Limit this vector's magnitude.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `max` | `number` | Maximum magnitude. |

## Returns

`this`

This vector.
